artifactDigestProvenanceSummary.blockedSubstitute: artifact names without digest or public/source provenance
artifactDigestProvenanceSummary.passBoundary: Adoption proof artifacts must include a digest or public/source provenance plus redaction and outcome fields.

artifactDigestProvenanceSummary.blockedSubstitute: security notes that name artifacts but omit digest or review-source provenance
artifactDigestProvenanceSummary.passBoundary: Security proof artifacts must include digest or review-source provenance plus methodology, redaction, and findings summary.

artifactRedactionSummary.passBoundary: Adoption proof requires redacted/public command and artifact evidence with privateDataRedacted=true plus outcome and non-claims.
Security proof requires reviewed stable-v4 surfaces, methodology, redacted artifacts, findings summary, and no open critical/high findings.

coverage.label: Independent adoption evidence
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication reject weak adoption signals and require independent actor, commands, artifacts, redaction, outcome, and non-claims before stable-v4 release?

coverage.label: Final security-review evidence
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication reject vague security evidence and require reviewed surfaces, severity thresholds, redaction, methodology, findings summary, and non-claims before stable-v4 release?

coverage.label: External evidence freshness
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication reject stale adoption and security-review evidence by comparing evidence generatedAt timestamps against the release manifest timestamp?

coverage.label: External evidence source classes
coverage.rejectionProved: weak substitutes rejected as adoption/security proof
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication keep accepted external evidence source classes, actor/reviewer relationships, and rejected substitutes visible so weak substitutes cannot be mistaken for adoption or security proof?

coverage.label: External evidence relationship gates
coverage.rejectionProved: wrong actor/reviewer relationships rejected as adoption/security proof
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication keep external evidence relationship gates visible so maintainer-only adoption runs and unreviewed security notes cannot satisfy adoption or security proof?

coverage.label: External evidence artifact redaction
coverage.rejectionProved: unredacted or provenance-free artifacts rejected as adoption/security proof
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication keep external evidence artifact redaction and provenance gates visible so private paths, screenshots, tokens, and unreviewed artifacts cannot satisfy adoption or security proof?

coverage.label: External evidence artifact digest provenance
coverage.rejectionProved: filename-only artifacts rejected as adoption/security proof
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication require external adoption and security-review artifacts to include digest or public/source provenance instead of only naming artifact files?

coverage.label: External evidence review-scope mapping
coverage.rejectionProved: broad security-review wording rejected as final security proof
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication require final security-review evidence to map reviewed surfaces to the stable-v4 release scope instead of using broad review wording?

coverage.label: External evidence expiry window
coverage.rejectionProved: open-ended external evidence rejected as stable-publication proof
coverage.sourceQuestion: Does stable-publication require external adoption and final security-review evidence to carry an explicit expiry window beyond generatedAt freshness?

decisionSummary.nonClaimSummary: This is fixture coverage, not adoption, final security-review, or stable-v4 publication proof.
decisionSummary.verdict: Adoption, security-review, freshness, source-class, relationship-gate, artifact-redaction, artifact digest/provenance, review-scope mapping, and expiry-window fixture questions are covered; evaluate the next real QA gap.

expiryWindowSummary.blockedSubstitute: fresh-looking adoption record without an explicit expiry window
expiryWindowSummary.passBoundary: Adoption proof must state an expiry window or max age in addition to generatedAt freshness.

expiryWindowSummary.blockedSubstitute: security-review record without explicit expiry or reviewed-release boundary
expiryWindowSummary.passBoundary: Security proof must state the release version and expiry window for the review packet.

nonClaims: Fixture coverage proves report-quality behavior only.
Fixture coverage is not independent adoption evidence.
Fixture coverage is not final security-review evidence.
Fixture coverage does not prove stable-v4 publication.
purpose: Compact index of public stable-publication external-evidence fixture coverage.

relationshipGateSummary.passBoundary: Adoption proof requires an independent external actor plus commands, artifacts, redaction, outcome, and non-claims.
Security proof requires reviewed stable-v4 surfaces, methodology, findings summary, artifacts, redaction, and no open critical/high findings.

reviewScopeMappingSummary.blockedSubstitute: generic final security review notes without stable-v4 surface mapping
reviewScopeMappingSummary.passBoundary: Final security-review proof must map each reviewed surface to the stable-v4 release scope and evidence artifact.
